title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: STEVENSON CLINIC BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-clinic and virtual visits with licensed behavioral health providers for topics such as reducing anxiety and depression, managing family life and parenting, improving relationships, managing stress, improving sleep, building healthy habits, coping with an illness or injury, alcohol and substance use, and managing grief and loss. 875 SW Rock Creek Drive Stevenson, WA 98648 Eligibility: Individuals who are established One Community Health patients Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (509) 427-4212 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (509) 427-4212 FAX (509) 493-9538 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP, Medicare and private insurance. Offers sliding scale discount for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, other languages interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River and Wasco Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Bereavement and Grief Counseling Individual Counseling Individual Counseling * Anxiety Disorders Individual Counseling * Chronic Depression Individual Counseling * Major Depression Individual Counseling * People with Chronic Illnesses Stress Management Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. STEVENSON CLINIC
